mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(r.write_year, '-', r.doc_type, '-', r.doc_no) AS id, r.key_content AS content, -- nullable json_build_object ( 'hrId', r.hr_id, 'name', r.hr_nm, 'jobTitle', r.jbrp_nm, 'orgName', r.orgn_nm, 'profileImageId', wi.file_id -- nullable ) AS writer, CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.receipt_dt, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(r.receipt_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END AS receiptedAt, -- nullable CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.reply_dt, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(r.reply_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END AS repliedAt, -- nullable CASE WHEN COALESCE(r.action_dt, '') != '' THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(r.action_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END AS actionedAt, -- nullable r.action_content AS action, -- nullable r.remark, -- nullable CASE WHEN r.action_orgn_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'id', r.action_orgn_id, 'name', r.action_orgn_nm -- nullable ) ELSE NULL END AS actor, -- nullable r.created_at AS createdAt-- nullable FROM esg.tb_safety_health_info_register r LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file wi ON wi.comp_id = r.comp_id AND wi.target_type = 'hrImg' AND wi.target_id = r.hr_id AND wi.del_yn = 'N' WHERE r.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND r.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND r.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND r.doc_no =#{docNo} -- :doc_no AND r.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_health_info_register WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_health_info_register ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, hr_id, hr_nm, orgn_id, orgn_nm, jbrp_id, jbrp_nm, use_yn, key_content, receipt_dt, created_at, created_by ) SELECT #{writeYear}, -- These values are passed as parameters #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, h.hr_id, h.hr_nm, h.orgn_id, o.orgn_nm, h.jbrp AS jbrp_id, jbrp.jbrp_nm, 'Y', -- Static value 'Y' #{keyContent}, -- This value is passed as a parameter #{receiptDt}, -- This value is passed as a parameter NOW(), -- Current timestamp #{createdBy} -- This value is passed as a parameter FROM esg.v_hr_info h LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = #{compId} AND o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = t.jbrp AND jbrp.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE h.hr_id = #{hrId} LIMIT 1
